**⚠️ IMPORTANT:** Do NOT open a public issue if you believe you have found a sensitive security vulnerability, especially one that could expose PHI/PII. 

Please follow our [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md) guidelines and report vulnerabilities directly to our security team via email at security@example.com.

If you are confident this is a non-sensitive security enhancement, you may proceed with this issue template.

**Description**
Describe the security issue or enhancement.
